### exit 0
### stdout
### stderr
MKDIR: sub
LINK: sub/a => ../../stow/pkg/sub/a
### tree
dir  home
dir  stow
dir  stow/pkg
dir  stow/pkg/sub

dir  target/sub
link target/sub/a -> ../../stow/pkg/sub/a
### end
